since_last: 26% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.59%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.41% · BTC -1.02% · Gold -1.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.52%. 26% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.59%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -12.07%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +6.10%, INTU +5.83%, ADBE +4.31%, CRM +3.77%, WDAY +3.21%. Laggards: SKHY -12.07%, CEVA -10.44%, OKLO -10.18%, AMBA -9.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.96% at $131.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
